public_reputation: Foundry engineer trusted with vent-prison seals and heatproof granary checks.
manner: Views problems as maintenance loads, throughput failures, or structural weaknesses before anything else. In Psanan, that reads as someone heat-forged, direct, and honor-conscious, shaped by household authority and volcanic endurance, and the habits of a engineers still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of engineers in and around Ashforge Citadel, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Ashforge Citadel workable through the obligations of engineers while managing the immediate pressure of house rivalry in Psanan.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the underlying system working while everyone notices it only when stress, wear, or neglect begin to show. Around Ashforge Citadel, that usually means carrying house rivalry, forge accidents, ashfall damage without letting the role of engineers visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Ina Cinderbrace can open restricted paths or practical knowledge if the party helps keep the underlying system alive.
Ina Cinderbrace needs outside help before wear, sabotage, or bottleneck pressure turns into a public failure in Ashforge Citadel.

support_scope_notes: Integrated from the prior_release canon-ready named-NPC ledger append. Unsupported fields remain restrained.
public_signal: Tool wear, work scars, or system-focused habits make Ina Cinderbrace visibly responsible for keeping something larger from failing. In Ashforge Citadel, this lands inside a public field already shaped by Great House Citadel Circle, Forge Dedication Halls.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Ashforge Citadel: worksites, depots, spans, loading points, maintenance corridors, or workshops
